section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has an allergy to penicillin.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Allergy status is typically part of the history/subjective information rather than an observed finding, but its placement in O is unlikely to mislead clinical interpretation.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has an allergy to penicillin.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Allergy status is a historical fact, not an assessment or diagnostic impression; including it in A is more of an organizational issue than a clinically misleading one.
